_comment: Projects shown on the README as a generated Experience Timeline SVG.
Edit this file, commit, and push -- assets/projects-timeline.svg and the
To rebuild locally instead:  python tools/build_readme.py
start        (required)  start date, e.g. '2024' or '2024-06' (orders the timeline)
end          (optional)  end date; omit to show 'Present'
link         (optional)  any other URL (demo / paper / site)
tech         (optional)  list of skill tags (colored via skills.json)
accent       (optional)  'red' or 'blue' for the timeline dot; default alternates
Newest start date appears at the top. Replace the examples with real work.

projects.title: BioBuilder
projects.description: Fully web-based biochemical kinetics editor with 300+ monthly visitors.

projects.title: RGFN Batched Learning
projects.description: Repository for LSD-Flow. Generative chemistry machine-learning model that builds chemicals from reactions and building blocks.

projects.title: NTv2 Interpretability
projects.description: Discovered latent features in DNA foundation model correlated with diseased DNA by training a sparse autoencoder on NTv2's embeddings.

projects.title: Shell from scratch
projects.description: Implemented a shell from scratch in C, supporting basic commands, piping, networking, and parent-child processes.
